title: Adoption Readiness Execution Chain
outOfScope: Treating static readiness as a security, compliance, or production proof
Approving project-owned Profile, Guard, CI, or quality commands automatically
Changing product source code or external deployment state

sources.reason: WI09 readiness aggregation and fail-closed target.
Adoption readiness boundary and command guidance.
Japanese adoption readiness boundary and command guidance.
Existing static readiness aggregation and fail-closed checks.
Readiness state derivation and evidence boundary.
Readiness failure and successful configuration coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: Readiness aggregates project-owned evidence and must remain fail-closed when required evidence is missing or not_run.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the serial remediation plan and complete Work Item lifecycle.

preReviewWarnings: Readiness must distinguish static completeness from runtime effectiveness and preserve not_run evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Readiness aggregates Profile, complexity policy, quality commands, critical domains, Guards, and unknowns into an explicit state with missing evidence blocking.
Unavailable or not_run project checks remain not_run and cannot satisfy readiness.
Template-maintenance exemption remains explicit and does not claim adopter production readiness.
Focused tests cover missing, placeholder, not_run, configured, and template-exemption readiness states.
English and Japanese adoption documentation describes the aggregated readiness state and its non-security boundary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Adoption Readiness currently checks many configuration facts separately, but the Configure workflow needs one evidence-backed fail-closed state that aggregates Profile, Policy, quality commands, Critical Domains, Guards, and unresolved unknowns without overclaiming runtime or production readiness.
constraints: The checker is static and never executes arbitrary project quality commands.
Missing, unavailable, and not_run inputs are blocking states when required.
The template-maintenance exemption stays explicit and enterpriseAssurance stays not_claimed.
Use standard-library code and preserve the existing readiness schema and CLI.
intent.rationale: A single conservative readiness state gives Configure and ai-start a deterministic transition while keeping domain execution and human approval outside the static checker.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Aggregate adoption readiness evidence into a fail-closed, non-production-proof state.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: missing Profile, Policy, Guard, or quality evidence blocks readiness
not_run or placeholder project checks cannot satisfy readiness
explicit template-maintenance exemption remains narrow and non-production

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized governance code, tests, documentation, PR, merge, archive, close, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
